title: Ktrip
description:
This is An Using Fabric Based On 
Performance-Adventure
(Not Updating Often Sorry).
body:
**Hello**                                                                   

This is a performance modpack that is suitable for
most computers!And if you have a powerfull one you will 
most likely be able to run it with shaders!

**Also this Modpack adds plenty of new feutures for example:**

- New biomes
- Backpacks!
- A remodeled end/nether
- A remodeled eating animation
- A minimap
- You can play with friends 
using the essential mod!
- And lasty remodeled:
- Mineshafts,Dungeons
- Purpur Mods!
- And more!!!!


**Recource Packs incuded in the ModPack!**
- Chat Reporter Helper
- Dramatic Skys
- Fresh Animations
- Glowing Ores
- Icons
- Mandala's GUI-Dark Mode
- Fast Better Grass
- Fresh Moves
- Enhanced Boss Bars
_(also some recourcepacks may be enable by default
im not sure)_

**Included Shaders:**

- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Exposa Shaders

**Specs**

- Minimal Ram:2.5 Gb
- Recomended Ram:4-6 Gb


Thanks for Reading

By **Kpro548_**                                                   **(created using [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive). Which Means Updates Depend On It)**
